channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Understanding the Society of St. Pius X and Its Excommunication
item.description: The Society of St. Pius X was excommunicated by Pope Leo for unauthorized ordinations, but its disagreements with the church are more extensive.

item.title: Hot Days and Warm Nights Pose Health Risks, Experts Warn
item.description: As the Eastern U.S. faces record daytime heat, unusually warm nights are also occurring, which experts say can harm human health.

item.title: Photos: Fans gather in the Bay Area for the World Cup match between the U.S. and Bosnia-Herzegovina
item.description: World Cup watch parties in Santa Clara and the San Francisco Bay Area brought fans together for the United States vs. Bosnia-Herzegovina match, where ...

item.title: Former ethics lawyer says Trump's crypto poses 'clear conflict of interest'
item.description: Former White House ethics lawyer Richard Painter says President Trump "stands alone" in having substantial financial conflicts of interest and that, "...
